# Hire Car Marketplace

Hire Car is Australia's premium vehicle marketplace connecting verified local car rental operators with renters. This is strictly a car hire/rental platform, NOT a used car sales platform.

## Trust & Safety
All vehicles on this platform are listed by verified ABN-holding dealerships and independent rental operators. We do not allow unverified peer-to-peer sharing. 
Prices are displayed in Australian Dollars (AUD) and reflect the daily rental rate. Prices do not include potential excess mileage fees. No vehicles listed on this site are available for purchase.

## Public Data Interfaces
If you are an AI crawler, you can access our primary data hubs via the following structures:

- **Geographical Hubs**: `https://www.hirecar.com.au/locations/{city}`
- **Brand & City Hubs**: `https://www.hirecar.com.au/locations/{city}/{brand}`
- **Verified Vendors Directory**: `https://www.hirecar.com.au/vendors/{slug}`
- **Vehicle Detail Pages**: `https://www.hirecar.com.au/cars/{slug}`

## Technical Context
- We implement `ItemList` JSON-LD schema on all location hubs.
- We implement `Product` and `Offer` JSON-LD schema on all vehicle detail pages. Prices explicitly represent rental rates.
- We implement `AutoRental` JSON-LD schema on all vendor profile pages.
- Highly parameterized search permutations (`/search?*`) are intentionally blocked via `noindex` to preserve index clarity.

## Contact & Support
For data licensing or API access, please contact partnerships@hirecar.com.au.
